steps.title: Find the boundary line
steps.content:
The boundary passes through $(0,1)$ and $(1,-3)$. Its slope is:
$$
\frac{-3-1}{1-0}=-4
$$
With $y$-intercept $1$, the boundary is $y=1-4x$.

steps.title: Use the shaded side
steps.content: The shaded region is above the boundary line, so use a greater-than inequality: $$ y>1-4x $$ The answer is D.
